summary: The main claim is: Developing a similar framework for verifying the peaceful development of AI models is, of course, difficult.
Participation should be driven by a universal interest in ensuring the international community upholds safety norms in advanced AI development.
The main claim is: The “genie” metaphor for AI implies that any superintelligent AI is either level 1 or 4, but nothing in between.
If AI is level 2, then it is reasonably safe to develop, but arguably it should be carefully controlled by a few companies that give access only through an online service or API.
